'''Lanthe''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Var Hagen sector/Legends|Var Hagen sector]]. It was the original headquarters of [[Lanthe Artifice]], but when the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] nationalized all corporations, Lanthe Artifice relocated to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
